blockRolesDescription: Give selected blocks a reusable semantic role.
blockRolesUsage: Open a block menu, choose Stillmark Workbench, then select a role.
dailyNotesAutoCreateDescription: Silently create today's note when SiYuan starts without opening it.
dailyNotesAutoCreateFailed: Failed to create today's note on startup
dailyNotesButtonTitle: Open today's note; right-click or long-press for the last 7 days
dailyNotesCreateFailed: Failed to create or open the daily note
dailyNotesCurrentPageUnavailable: No document page is currently available
dailyNotesCurrentPathUnsupported: The current native daily-note path is ${path}. Enter a root directory to replace it with the fixed year/month/date structure.
dailyNotesHistoryFailed: Failed to load notes from the last 7 days
dailyNotesNotebookDescription: Daily notes are created only in the selected open notebook.
dailyNotesNotebookUnavailable: The configured notebook is closed or no longer exists. Configure it again.
dailyNotesOpenFailed: Failed to open the daily note
dailyNotesRootDescription: For example, /Journal. Notes are stored under year/month/YYYY-MM-DD.
dailyNotesRootInvalid: The root path cannot contain empty levels or ..
dailyNotesRootMustStartSlash: The root path must start with /
dailyNotesRootRequired: The root path cannot be empty or the root directory /
dailyNotesRootTemplateForbidden: The root path cannot contain Sprig template expressions
dailyNotesSettingsLoadFailed: Failed to load daily note settings
dailyNotesSettingsPartialFailure: Part of the SiYuan configuration changed, but plugin storage or readback failed
dailyNotesSettingsSaveFailed: Failed to save daily note settings
dailyNotesSettingsStillLoading: Settings are still loading. Try again in a moment.
dailyNotesTemplateConfigChanged: The notebook's native template setting changed. Save the plugin settings again.
dailyNotesTemplateDescription: Open a template page and choose Use current page, or use a file under data/templates. Choose one source; it applies only on first creation.
dailyNotesTemplateInvalid: The template path cannot contain empty levels or ..
dailyNotesTemplateMustBeRelative: The template path must be relative to data/templates
dailyNotesTemplatePageUnavailable: The template page no longer exists. Select it again.
dailyNotesTemplateSelectFailed: Failed to select the template page
dailyNotesTemplateSnapshotFailed: Failed to refresh the page template snapshot
